news.headline: Alex Ovechkin's hat trick powers Capitals past Mammoth
news.linkText: Capitals' Ovechkin notches 34th career hat trick
news.description: Alex Ovechkin had his 34th career hat trick in the Capitals' 7-4 win over the Mammoth on Thursday.

images.name: Alex Ovechkin [600x400]
images.caption: Alex Ovechkin had his 184th career multigoal game on Thursday. Only Wayne Gretzky (189) has more in NHL history.

events.name: Detroit Red Wings at Buffalo Sabres

rotowire.headline: Copp scored an empty-netter in Thursday in a 3-1 win over the Canadiens.
rotowire.story: Copp missed three games due to injury before returning to action ahead of schedule against Montreal on Thursday. He also had two shots in 18:19 of ice time. Copp has nine goals, 29 assists and 96 shots on net in 66 games this season.
rotowire.description: Copp scored an empty-netter in Thursday in a 3-1 win over the Canadiens.
